# SOURCE: Copy Accelerator (CA)

> **Version:** 1.0.0
> **Created:** 2026-03-24
> **Last Updated:** 2026-03-24
> **Program:** Copy Accelerator
> **Authors:** Stefan Georgi (primary) & Justin Goff (co-primary)
> **Type:** Year-long membership program (weekly calls, live events, Q&A)
> **Date Range:** March 2019 — January 2021
> **Status:** COMPLETE

## SECTIONS

### Section Overview

| # | Section Name | Files | Content Files | Size | Key Topics |
|---|-------------|-------|---------------|------|-----------|
| 01 | The 9 Most Important Videos | 30 | 18 | ~450KB | RMBC foundation, mechanism, research methodology |
| 02 | Most Recent Calls | 16 | 10 | ~280KB | Gold calls, 2021 planning, advanced strategy |
| 03 | Sales Copy | 320 | 165 | ~3.8MB | Sales letters, VSLs, advertorials, leads, closes |
| 04 | Email Copy | 31 | 22 | ~520KB | Subject lines, sequences, deliverability, broadcasts |
| 05 | Conversion Boosters | 22 | 15 | ~350KB | Split testing, AOV optimization, page elements |
| 06 | Copywriting Business | 29 | 18 | ~400KB | Freelancing, pricing, client management, scaling |
| 07 | Open Q&A & Guests | 121 | 62 | ~1.2MB | Wide-ranging Q&A, guest presentations |
| 08 | Tried & True Facebook Compliance | 73 | 35 | ~600KB | FB policy, compliant copy, account survival |
| 09 | LITE Calls (Sabah) | 29 | 18 | ~300KB | Fundamentals Q&A, beginner-friendly content |
| 10 | Swipes & Sales Copy Dissections | 9 | 7 | ~200KB | Teardowns of winning copy, analysis |
| 11 | Austin Live Virtual Event (Sept 2020) | 17 | 10 | ~250KB | Multi-speaker event, advanced topics |
| 12 | Vegas Live Event (Feb 2020) | 12 | 8 | ~200KB | In-person mastermind, networking sessions |
| 13 | Austin Mastermind Event (Sept 2019) | 25 | 12 | ~280KB | Early community event, foundational teachings |
| 14 | Bonus: Stefan's Copy System — Vegas | 25 | 9 | ~180KB | Stefan's personal copy system deep-dive |

### Section Details

#### Section 01: The 9 Most Important Videos (RMBC Foundation)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  SECTION 01 — THE 9 MOST IMPORTANT VIDEOS                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  Files: 30 | Content: 18 | Size: ~450KB                                    │
│  Speaker: Stefan Georgi (100%)                                              │
│                                                                             │

│  teaches the RMBC Method from scratch — Research, Mechanism,                │
│  Brief, Copy — plus his Sales Letter Outline and core frameworks.          │
│                                                                             │
│  KEY CONTENT:                                                               │
│  • RMBC Method deep-dive (Research → Mechanism → Brief → Copy)             │
│  • Research Document methodology                                           │
│  • Mechanism identification and articulation                               │
│  • Brief construction (section-by-section outline)                         │
│  • Sales Letter Outline (master structure)                                  │
│  • Lead Structure (6 types)                                                 │
│  • Close Architecture (AOV Money Close)                                     │
│  • Proof Stack methodology                                                 │
│                                                                             │
│  EXTRACTION: 30+ elements (primarily FW and MET layers)                    │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## PROCESSING NOTES

### Extraction Methodology

1. **Scan:** All 759 files scanned for content (wc -c, not wc -l)
2. **Filter:** 360 empty/stub files excluded (PDF covers, 0-16 bytes)
3. **Chunk:** 399 content files chunked by section and speaker
4. **Extract:** DNA elements extracted per-speaker (SG, JG, Guests)
5. **Validate:** Cross-referenced frameworks across sections for consistency
6. **Assign:** Elements assigned to appropriate DNA layers (L1-L5)

### Quality Notes

- Section 03 (Sales Copy) has the highest density of actionable frameworks
- Section 01 (Most Important Videos) is the best starting point for RMBC
- Guest contributions are relatively light (23 elements) but high quality
- Facebook compliance content (Section 08) is time-sensitive — policies change
- Live event recordings (Sections 11-14) contain unique insights not in weekly calls
- Empty files are consistent across sections (~47% empty rate)

### Known Gaps

| Gap | Impact | Mitigation |
|-----|--------|------------|
| PDF-only content not transcribed | ~360 files inaccessible | Focus on 399 content files (sufficient coverage) |
| Guest attribution sometimes unclear | Some elements may be mis-attributed | Cross-referenced with known guest topics |
| Date metadata not always in filename | Harder to track temporal evolution | Used section ordering as proxy |

---
